compatible_maskfactory_tests.command: python -m pytest -q <all maskfactory QA test modules>

verified_behavior: Mode A resolves exact fixture package bytes without producer mutation.
Mode A verifies release, source, media, owner, ontology, transform, authority, certificate-absence, hash, size, and path bindings.
Mode B verifies one fresh exact health route and preserves draft authority in fixture mode.
Ambiguous transport persists outcome_unknown and forbids resubmission before exact reconciliation.
Not-found reconciliation is request/hash/idempotency bound and consumes one explicit fixture-only signature-verified authorization.
Normalized results preserve input ROI versus output identity and pass frozen schema plus semantic-core validation.
Arbitration selects stronger valid authority, never replaces it with a newer draft, branches only inside explicit budget, and abstains on ambiguity.
